name: v1.2.0
body:
## Release Notes — v1.2.0

### New Features
- Cross-platform support: Windows, macOS, Linux (Desktop) and Android (Mobile)
- Real-time cloud sync powered by Supabase
- Recurring transaction automation (daily, weekly, monthly, yearly)
- Savings goal tracking
- Analytics dashboard with category breakdowns and spending insights
- Local-to-cloud data migration bridge
- iOS support (Xcode project ready for archiving)

### Improvements
- Migrated Supabase credentials from hardcoded values to environment variables
- Replaced dynamic require() with static imports in mobile app
- Made header date dynamic instead of hardcoded
- Updated HTML title from "Tauri + React + Typescript" to "MoneyFlow"
- Fixed hardcoded redirect URL in mobile auth flow
- Comprehensive .gitignore with platform-specific rules
- Updated CI workflow for reliable Android builds (arm64-v8a)
- Enhanced README with detailed build instructions for all platforms

### Bug Fixes
- Removed all console.error statements from production code
- Fixed Android x86 native module compilation issue (build targets arm64-v8a)
- Proper error handling without debug logging in production

### Known Issues
- iOS build requires macOS with Xcode 16+ (not available on Windows/Linux CI)
- Android x86 and x86_64 architectures excluded from build due to react-native-worklets 0.5.1 NDK compatibility issue
- shared/ directory is a placeholder for future refactoring
- Mobile app currently does not test iOS builds in CI
